title: senecio actinotus
intro: Senecio actinotus, also known as the Jacob's ladder or dusty miller, is a flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its white or pink flowers and grayish-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Senecio actinotus include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be infused in tea, tinctured, or applied topically as an ointment or salve.
